query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('memory_episodes','kg_nodes','kg_edges','compliance_audit','privacy_audit','education_modules','education_progress','plan_adherence','client_segments','practice_metrics','student_loans','equity_grants','coi_contacts','referrals','digital_asset_inventory','notification_log') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
